request.description:
vehicleType: bike | auto | mini_truck | tempo | truck
Pass pickupLat/pickupLng/dropLat/dropLng → backend auto calculates distance via Google Maps
Returns pricing for all vehicle types + distanceKm + durationMin
isMock: true means Google Maps key not set yet

rideType: on_demand | carpool | herdrive | night_safe | airport_transfer
vehicleCategory: bike | auto | sedan | suv | premium
Pass pickupLat/pickupLng/dropLat/dropLng → Google Maps auto calculates distance + duration
Returns fare for ALL vehicle categories in allOptions[]
isMock: true means Google Maps key not set (uses approximate calculation)

query.description: searching | driver_assigned | driver_arriving | ride_started | completed | cancelled

request.description:
Valid transitions:
driver_assigned → driver_arriving
driver_arriving → ride_started
ride_started → completed

Driver sends GPS every 5 seconds
Response includes eta: { etaMin, etaText, distanceKm } to active order pickup/drop
eta is null if driver has no active order

Valid transitions:
driver_assigned → picked_up
picked_up → in_transit
in_transit → out_for_delivery
out_for_delivery → delivered | failed

exec: if (pm.response.code === 201 || pm.response.code === 200) { var d = pm.response.json().data; if (d && d._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('ADDRESS_ID', d._id); }

request.description:
Mumbai: BKC → Andheri West (~7.2km)
Backend auto-calculates distance via Google Maps
Returns pricing for all vehicle types + distanceKm + durationMin
Delhi: Lajpat Nagar → Connaught Place (~8km)
Bengaluru: MG Road → Indiranagar (~3.5km)

Mumbai: BKC → Airport
Returns fare for ALL vehicle categories: bike, auto, sedan, suv, premium
With auto-calculated distance from Google Maps

Delhi: Lajpat Nagar → Connaught Place
HerDrive has 10% surcharge

Bengaluru: MG Road → Kempegowda Airport (~35km)
Airport Transfer has 30% surcharge

Driver sends GPS every 5 seconds
Response: { location, eta: { etaMin, etaText, distanceKm } }
eta calculated to active order pickup/delivery point via Google Maps
eta is null if no active order

request.description: Returns everything: topCards (4 stat cards with % growth), quickStats (5 boxes), revenueTrend, hourlyOrders, revenueByService, serviceBreakdown, liveTracking, topDrivers, recentOrders (with driver key fixed), recentRides, recentActivity, weeklySummary, customerInsights, alerts
Returns: totalRevenue, todayRevenue, revenueGrowth%, totalOrders, activeDrivers, completionRate%
Returns daily revenue + order count for chart
Returns 24-hour order count for bar chart. hour 0-23, label '00:00'-'23:00'

Returns city, orders, revenue, previousRevenue, growthPercent (+12.5 or -3.2), trend (up/down)
Fixed: upside/downside % now included

query.description: Search across users, drivers, parcels, rides — min 2 chars

request.description:
Searches: users (name/email/phone), drivers (vehicleNumber), parcels (trackingId/city), rides (rideId)
Returns: results.users[], results.drivers[], results.parcels[], results.rides[], counts{}
Returns flat data array — trackingId, status, total, customer, driver, cities, createdAt
Returns all notifications with user details + unreadCount

Sends notification to all users of a role
targetRole: customer | driver | admin (omit for all users)
type: order | payment | driver | promo | system
Stats: total, inTransit, deliveredToday, pendingPickup, active, failed, scheduled
Stats: activeNow, outForDelivery, pickedUp, delayed. Live parcel list.
Stats: total, todayScheduled, recurringOrders, pendingConfirmation
Stats: totalFailed, recipientUnavailable, addressIssues, otherReasons

query.description: Optional — search specific parcel by trackingId

request.description: Without trackingId: live stats (beingTracked, outForDelivery, inTransit, avgETA). With trackingId: find parcel.
Stats: total, activeNow, completedToday, cancelled
Stats: activeTrips, enRoute (avgETA 7min), inProgress (avgCompletion 12min), safetyAlerts
Stats: totalCompleted (+growth%), totalRevenue (+growth%), avgRating, cancellationRate%. Also: peakHours[], serviceBreakdown[]
Stats: activeRules, avgFare, surgeActive, lastUpdated. Returns all pricing rules.

serviceType: on_demand|carpool|herdrive|night_safe|airport_transfer|parcel|nemt|shuttle|movers
ruleType: standard|surge|time_based|distance_based|flat
NEMT Stats: todayTrips, inProgress, completed, revenueToday, weeklyTrend[]

request.description: recurrence: one_time|daily|weekly|monthly
status: scheduled|in_progress|completed|cancelled
Stats: totalRevenue(+growth%), platformFees(+growth%), driverEarnings(+growth%), pendingSettlement
Stats: pendingPayouts{amount,count}, processedThisWeek{amount,count}, onHold, scheduled
status: pending|processed|on_hold|scheduled|failed
Stats: pendingReview{count,amount}, processing, approvedThisWeek, rejected
reason: service_not_delivered|overcharge|driver_cancelled|duplicate_charge|other
status: approved|rejected|processing
Stats: pendingReview, approved, rejected, expiringSoon
status: pending_review|approved|rejected|expiring_soon
Stats: open, underInvestigation, resolvedThisWeek, highSeverity

type: accident|customer_complaint|safety_violation|lost_item|fraud|other
severity: low|medium|high|critical
status: open|under_investigation|action_taken|resolved|closed
Stats: scheduled, inProgress, completed, failed
Stats: total, active, inactive, blocked, totalRevenue, avgOrderValue. Segments: premiumMembers, highValue, frequentUsers, atRisk
Stats: total, activeNow. List of all admin accounts.
Stats: totalDrivers, activeNow, avgRating, totalEarnings. WeeklyTrips chart (Mon-Sun).
Stats: totalApplications (this month), pendingReview, approved, approvalRate%. Monthly applications chart. Recent pending applications list.
Stats: avgRating, totalTrips (+growth%), onTimeRate%, totalRevenue. Top 10 drivers leaderboard. Rating distribution chart.

topCards: totalRevenue(+growth%), totalOrders(+growth%), avgOrderValue, successRate%
Charts: revenueByService (pie - Parcel/Ride/etc), weeklyBreakdown (bar), topZones (revenue by city)
Returns settings grouped by category. Auto-seeds 20 default settings on first call.
